message.content:
@startuml
actor "任务开始 nsq 消息" as Actor

participant "GuideTaskStartListener" as Listener
participant "GuideTaskStartProcessor" as Processor
participant "GuideTaskStartDomainService" as DomainService
participant "GuideTaskStartStrategy" as Strategy
participant "ShoppingGuideReadApi" as ReadApi
participant "GuideTaskRepository" as TaskRepo
participant "GuideTaskDataRepository" as DataRepo

Actor -> Listener : 1 监听任务开始消息
Listener -> Processor : 2 开始处理
Processor -> TaskRepo : 3 查询任务
Processor -> DomainService : 4 开始任务
DomainService -> Strategy : 5 构建任务
Strategy -> ReadApi : 6 根据部门查询导购
ReadApi --> Strategy : 7 根据导购进行任务分配

box "Transaction"
DomainService -> DataRepo : 8 保存分配给导购的任务
DomainService -> TaskRepo : 9 status flow 任务状态流转至 已启动
DomainService -> DataRepo : 10 任务流转为执行中
end box

@enduml
